title: July 5, 1997: The day Martina Hingis, aged 16, became the Wimbledon’s youngest Open Era champion
description: Every day, Tennis Majors takes you back in time to relive a tennis event which happened on this specific day. On this day in 1997, the Swiss Miss fought back from a set down to beat Jana Novotna and create history at the oldest tennis tournament in the world

title: 3 winners and 2 losers from the first week of Wimbledon 2026
description: The first week of Wimbledon 2026 was exceedingly interesting, and here is who did and didn't set themselves up for major success.

title: Bublik Foils Tiafoe in Five Dramatic Sets at Wimbledon
description: Alexander Bublik outlasted Frances Tiafoe in five sets to reach the Wimbledon Round of 16.

title: Wimbledon 2026 Day Six Recap
description: Day Six of Wimbledon 2026 completed the fourth-round lineup, with Alexander Zverev, Alex de Minaur and Taylor Fritz all moving through, while the day’s biggest drama came from the five-set battles. British wildcard Arthur Fery kept the home crowd interested, somehow finding a way past Zizou Bergs in a four-hour, 38-minute epic on Court 18, …

title: Bublik closes the day with a marathon win as Zverev, Fritz and Lehecka also advance
description: Extrait: A 13-11 tie-break, five sets and four hours to close the day: Alexander Bublik (No 10) outlasted Frances Tiafoe 4-6, 7-6 (5), 7-6 (11), 4-6, 6-3 to reach the last 16, where Taylor Fritz awaits – as Alexander Zverev and Jiri Lehecka booked a meeting of their own.

title: Dimitrov Rewrites the Script at Wimbledon
description: Grigor Dimitrov's fairy tale run at Wimbledon continued on Day 6.

title: Grigor Dimitrov outlasted Matteo Berrettini in Wimbledon's nicest duel
description: In a match rightly played on centre court at Wimbledon. Grigor Dimitrov faced Matteo Dimitrov for a place in the fourth round.

title: Dimitrov’s fairytale rolls on as he outlasts Berrettini in a five-set epic
description: A year after leaving Centre Court injured and heartbroken, Grigor Dimitrov (No 146) outlasted Matteo Berrettini 6-3, 6-4, 3-6, 5-7, 6-3 to reach the Wimbledon last 16.

title: Taylor Fritz just gave American tennis exactly what it needed
description: Taylor Fritz is trying to become the first American to win Wimbledon since 2000, but Italian Lorenzo Sonego was standing in his way in the third round.

title: Wimbledon, Day 7 Order of Play (round of 16 begins)
description: Round or 16 action kicks off at Wimbledon, with singles, doubles and juniors all around the grounds.

title: Eala’s “Personal Journey” Paves the Way for Filipino Dreams
description: After her milestone win at Wimbledon, Alexandra Eala reflects on inspiring a nation and her personal journey.

title: See the Wimbledon Women’s Singles Round of 16 Matchups
description: And then there were 16 (women) at Wimbledon. See who plays who.

title: Swiatek: Same Mistakes Led to Downfall Against Eala
description: The six-time champion talked about what went wrong in her Centre Court loss to Alexandra Eala.

title: Going Fourth: Keys Conquers Anisimova on Wild Wimbledon Day of Upsets
description: Madison Keys scored her eighth straight win and WTA-best 10th grass-court triumph of the year.

title: Fery caps a dismal British fortnight with the comeback of his life
description: Down 4-1 in the fourth, down 4-1 in the fifth, and standing at the end: British wild card Arthur Fery (No 114) beat Zizou Bergs 2-6, 7-5, 2-6, 7-6 (3), 7-6 (5) for the win of his life and a first Grand Slam last 16, a rare bright day in a grim British fortnight.

title: “I don’t care anymore about the results”: Świątek concedes her level after Wimbledon loss to Eala
description: Iga Świątek's Wimbledon title defence ended in a third-round defeat to Alexandra Eala, the six-time major champion admitting she no longer cares about results and must rebuild her game as a difficult season deepens.

title: Alexander Zverev takes another step toward a career-first at Wimbledon
description: Alexander Zverev won his first Grand Slam title by taking the French Open crown in 2026. Now, he is trying to complete a first at Wimbledon too.

title: Cobolli survives a bagel opening to fight past Khachanov into the last 16
description: Flavio Cobolli defeated Karen Khachanov 0-6, 7-6 (4), 6-7 (5), 6-2, 6-2 on Saturday afternoon and will play Australian Alex de Minaur, the No 5 seed, in the next round

title: Serena Williams' latest Wimbledon update says what fans already suspected
description: Serena Williams made what many hoped would be a triumphant return to Wimbledon this week. Instead, the whole situation turned into a dud.

title: Serena Williams Pulls Out of Wimbledon Doubles With Knee Issue
description: Serena Williams' Wimbledon journey came to an end on Saturday as she was forced to pull out of doubles.

title: Eala Makes History for the Philippines, Stunning Defending Champion Swiatek at Wimbledon
description: Alexandra Eala scored one of the biggest victories of her career on her Centre Court debut, taking out defending champion Iga Swiatek to reach the fourth round.

title: Mertens Stuns Second-Ranked Rybakina for Wimbledon Fourth Round Return
description: Elise Mertens snapped a six-match losing streak to Elena Rybakina with one of her greatest career wins.

title: Alexandra Eala had Iga Swiatek searching for answers at Wimbledon
description: Iga Swiatek was trying to repeat as Wimbledon champion, but in the third round, upstart Alexandra Eala had different ideas.

title: “For someone like me, this is everything” – Eala dethrones champion Swiatek at Wimbledon
description: In tears on Centre Court, a crosscourt forehand still ringing in her ears: Alexandra Eala (No 29) stunned defending champion Iga Swiatek 7-6 (9), 6-2, saving two set points, dethroning a champion and becoming the first Filipino ever to reach a Grand Slam's second week, as the Pole tumbled out of the top five.

title: Mertens stuns second seed Rybakina to reach the last 16
description: Seven defeats in eight meetings, then a giant slain: Elise Mertens (No 25) stunned second seed Elena Rybakina 7-6 (4), 6-1 to reach the Wimbledon last 16 and end the 2022 champion's title bid.

title: De Minaur powers into a third straight Wimbledon last 16 as Svajda’s fight falls short
description: Only one set dropped all fortnight, and a third straight Wimbledon last 16: Alex de Minaur (No 5) weathered a Zachary Svajda fightback to win 6-2, 5-7, 6-2, 6-4, moving as well as he has all week with Flavio Cobolli next.

title: Serena Williams' Wimbledon return becoming unfair to other players
description: Serena Williams returned in full to professional tennis at Wimbledon, but the tournament bending over backward for her is getting to be a bit unfair.

title: July 4, 1938: The day Suzanne Lenglen, tennis’ first female superstar, passed away
description: Every day, Tennis Majors takes you back in time to relive a tennis event which happened on this specific day. On this day in 1938, Suzanne Lenglen, the first female tennis superstar, passed away at the young age of 39

title: Wimbledon 2026 Day Five Recap
description: Day Five of Wimbledon 2026 saw the first half of the fourth-round lineup confirmed, with Jannik Sinner and Novak Djokovic both moving through, while several seeds crashed out in a day full of momentum swings. Djokovic overcame a spirited challenge from Arthur Rinderknech to record his 105th match win at Wimbledon, drawing level with Roger …

title: Auger-Aliassime ends his Wimbledon frustration as Hurkacz downs Paul in the last matches of the day
description: Years of first-round exits behind him, Felix Auger-Aliassime (No 3) beat qualifier Michael Zheng 7-6 (1), 6-2, 6-1 to reach the Wimbledon last 16.

title: “It’s not about mentality”: Medvedev rejects the nerves theory after Wimbledon collapse
description: Daniil Medvedev rejected the idea that nerves cost him as he was beaten by Jan-Lennard Struff in the Wimbledon third round despite leading every set, the 2021 US Open champion admitting his instinct for solving big matches is deserting him in a difficult season.

title: “No ghost”: Sinner dismisses French Open hangover as he speaks openly about numerous adjustments to make
description: Jannik Sinner insists he carries "no ghost" from his shock French Open loss, but his uneven first week on and off court keeps the question alive as the Wimbledon champion heads into a last-16 tie with Shintaro Mochizuki.

title: Gauff completes the top-half line-up as the leading names march into the second week
description: The last woman through on a day for the favourites: Coco Gauff (No 7) edged qualifier Claire Liu 6-3, 6-7 (5), 6-2 to reach the Wimbledon last 16, where a meeting with Belinda Bencic – a three-hour winner over Anna Kalinskaya – awaits.

title: “I still have some gap to gain”: Sinner reaches Wimbledon fourth round still searching for his best
description: Jannik Sinner reached the Wimbledon fourth round with a straight-sets win over Jenson Brooksby but insisted he still has ground to make up, as the defending champion builds slowly towards a last-16 meeting with qualifier Shintaro Mochizuki.

title: Medvedev squanders a lead in every set as Struff completes a stunning turnaround
description: A break down in the first, 5-2 down in the second, a double break down in the third – and a winner in straight sets: Jan-Lennard Struff (No 74) stunned Daniil Medvedev (No 8) 7-6 (4), 7-6 (5), 7-5 to reach the Wimbledon last 16.

title: Arthur Rinderknech pushed Novak Djokovic further than expected at Wimbledon
description: Novak Djokovic was trying to chase his eighth Wimbledon title, but he first needed to get past Arthur Rinderknech in the third round. This is what happened.

title: Djokovic and Sinner march into the second week as the Serb draws level with Federer
description: A 105th Wimbledon win to draw level with Roger Federer: Novak Djokovic (No 7) edged Arthur Rinderknech 7-5, 6-4, 1-6, 7-6 (4) to reach the last 16, where defending champion Jannik Sinner and qualifier Shintaro Mochizuki also arrived on a record-laden Friday.

title: Naomi Osaka's Wimbledon statement should have the WTA on edge
description: Naomi Osaka might be verging on reclaiming her past excellence in full. She certainly looked that way against Daria Kasatkina at Wimbledon.

title: Osaka reaches a first Wimbledon fourth round after 13 years of waiting
description: Thirteen years a professional and never past this point on grass: Naomi Osaka (No 14) beat Daria Kasatkina 6-1, 6-3 to reach a first Wimbledon fourth round, weeks after a maiden second week at Roland-Garros.

title: Wimbledon handed Joao Fonseca the lesson he couldn’t avoid
description: Joao Fonseca is likely to become a highly successful tennis player, but he will have to go through some difficult lessons first. That happened at Wimbledon.

title: Safiullin halts Fonseca in straight sets and dissolves into tears on his return
description: A qualifier through three five-setters, now into the last 16 in tears: Roman Safiullin (No 132) stunned Joao Fonseca (No 24) 6-3, 6-3, 6-3 at Wimbledon, overwhelmed by a comeback from injury he feared might never come.

description: A match between Grigor Dimitrov and Jakub Mensik in the second round of Wimbledon turned into a battle of wills. Here is who won the match.

title: Matteo Berrettini takes one more step toward a Wimbledon goal that has eluded him
description: Matteo Berrettini is striving to win his first Wimbledon title after knocking on the door once. Arthur Fils stood in his way in the second round, though.

title: Alex Eala refused to let Wimbledon heartbreak become her story
description: Maya Joint was trying to build on her momentum of beating Serena Williams at Wimbledon. Alexandra Eala was trying to clear her own path. This is what happened.

title: WTA finally got something right, and tennis fans agree
description: The WTA Finals were scheduled to be played once again in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, in 2026, but due to the US-Iranian war, those plans have changed for the better.

title: Wimbledon 2026 Day Three Recap
description: The third day of Wimbledon 2026 brought a noticeable step up in quality from the two star names in this half of the draw. After a five-set grind and a rusty-looking performance on Monday, both Sinner and Djokovic responded with cleaner scorelines and more authoritative performances. The defending champion looked far sharper than in his …

description: Novak Djokovic put on a brilliant display of tennis against Stefanos Tsitsipas at Wimbledon 2026. Here is what happened.

description: Wimbledon isn't going easily for many of the top seeds, and Coco Gauff was the latest to be pushed in the early rounds. Solana Sierra was doing the pushing.

title: Jannik Sinner is making Wimbledon far more dramatic than expected
description: Jannik Sinner attempted to continue his path to repeat as Wimbledon champion, but he needed to defeat Nuno Borges in the second round to do so.

title: Aryna Sabalenka has Wimbledon rivals on high alert after latest win
description: Aryna Sabalenka hasn't yet won a Wimbledon title, but she is beginning her 2026 campaign as if she is on a mission.

title: Naomi Osaka has Wimbledon fans wondering if this is finally the year
description: Naomi Osaka is trying to chase her first Wimbledon title, and she wasn't going to let Anastasia Gasanova get in her way in the second round.
